item.author: krishna73568311

item.title: C的三元运算符 | C's Ternary Operator
item.description:
迈克尔·斯科维塔

发表于我在 14 或 15 岁时第一次学习用 C 编程，从那以后的几十年里，我经常使用三元运算符。 在以下情况下很方便：

 #include <stdio.h> #include <stdlib.h>
int main () { bool is_admin = check_admin (); set_level ( is_admin ? 999 : 1 ); return 0 ; }

如果您编写了三元运算符，则其工作方式相同：

 #include <stdio.h> #include <stdlib.h>
int main () { bool is_admin = check_admin (); if ( is_admin ) { set_level ( 999 ); } else { set_level ( 1 ); } return 0 ; }

我遇到了此运算符的另一种形式，我不记得以前见过，并想分享。 事实证明，这是一个GNU 扩展。 您可以省略? 和:完全一样，运算符稍微改变了一点，如果它不是 false、null 或零，则返回运算符之前的值，否则返回它之后的值。

 #include <stdio.h> #include <stdlib.h>
int main () { char * temp_dir = getenv ( "TEMPDIR" ) ?: getenv ( "TMPDIR" ) ?: getenv ( "TEMP" ) ?: "/tmp" ; printf ( "Temp dir is: %s" , temp_dir ); return 0 ; }

这与以下内容基本相同：

 #include <stdio.h> #include <stdlib.h>
int main () { char * temp_dir = getenv ( "TEMPDIR" ); if ( temp_dir == NULL ) temp_dir = getenv ( "TMPDIR" ); if ( temp_dir == NULL ) temp_dir = getenv ( "TEMP" ); if ( temp_dir == null ) temp_dir = "/tmp" ; printf ( "Temp dir is: %s" , temp_dir ); return 0 ; }

这通常称为空合并运算符，也存在于其他语言中，例如JavaScript和C# 。

穆罕默德沙拉基 - 暂停后，scovetta 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停解除。

解除暂停后，scovetta 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

取消发布后，scovetta 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 scovetta 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 scovetta：

报告其他不当行为

不屈不挠的 scovetta 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Michael Scovetta

Posted on Dec 21

I first learned to program in C when I was 14 or 15, and in the decades since, I've used the ternary operator often enough. It's convenient in cases like:

#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

int main() { bool is_admin = check_admin(); set_level(is_admin ? 999 : 1); return 0;
}

The ternary operator works the same if you had written:

#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

int main() { bool is_admin = check_admin(); if (is_admin) { set_level(999); } else { set_level(1); } return 0;
}

I came across another form of this operator, which I don't recall ever seeing before, and wanted to share. As it turns out, this is a GNU extension. You can omit the statement between the ? and the : entirely, and the operator changes a bit, returning either the value before the operator if it isn't false, null, or zero, or the value after it otherwise.

#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

int main() { char* temp_dir = getenv("TEMPDIR") ?: getenv("TMPDIR") ?: getenv("TEMP") ?: "/tmp"; printf("Temp dir is: %s", temp_dir); return 0;
}

This is essentially the same as:

#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>

int main() { char* temp_dir = getenv("TEMPDIR"); if (temp_dir == NULL) temp_dir = getenv("TMPDIR"); if (temp_dir == NULL) temp_dir = getenv("TEMP"); if (temp_dir == null) temp_dir = "/tmp"; printf("Temp dir is: %s", temp_dir); return 0;
}

This is usually called a null-coalescing operator, and exists in other languages too, like JavaScript and C#.

Rohan Kiratsata - Oct 27 '21

Eyuel Berga Woldemichael - Oct 26 '21

mohammed sharaki - Oct 22 '21

Once suspended, scovetta will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, scovetta will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by scovetta will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If scovetta is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag scovetta:

scovetta consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging scovetta will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: scovetta

item.title: 资源 ！ 资源 ！！ 资源 ！！！ | Resources ! Resources !! Resources !!!
item.description:
阿维纳什·瓦格

发表于大家好，作为初学者的许多人浪费了大量时间来研究最佳学习资源。

自去年 2 年以来，我收集了BEST RESOURCES ，这些资源由 Twitter 上的一些顶级专业开发人员共享。

我已将所有资源整理到概念页面上。 我很高兴与您分享那个概念页面。
希望任何初学者、中级人员，甚至是专家开发人员如果找到我的文章，那么我仍然确信我的概念会帮助他们。

我相信你会找到适合自己的东西：🚀

不要错过结帐：

大家好，我很高兴与大家分享我的 Master Notion Link！ 希望这些资源对您有所帮助！

这就是你会得到的👇

如果您喜欢我的博客和我分享的信息，请确保喜欢并评论我的博客文章。
您也可以在LinkedIn上与我联系，也可以在Twitter 上关注我

我还帮助初学者开发人员以有效的方式开始 Web 开发，并帮助新手开发人员在我的 YOUTUBE 频道上获得他们的第一份远程工作和现场工作（如果您正在寻找远程工作，请务必订阅我的频道）

与人交往更多，通过面对面的会议与人建立联系。
继续编码，继续成长！

作为 JavaScript 开发者，我们通常不必自己处理编译器。 然而，了解 JavaScript 引擎的基础知识并了解它如何处理我们对人类友好的 JS 代码并将其转化为机器可以理解的代码绝对是一件好事！ 编码愉快！

一旦暂停，avinashvagh 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，avinashvagh 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，avinashvagh 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 avinashvagh 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 avinashvagh 的方法：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 avinashvagh 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Avinash Vagh

Posted on Dec 21

Hey Everyone, Lots of people as a Beginner waste lots of their time in researching for Best Resources for studies.

I've collected BEST RESOURCES since last 2 year which was shared by some of top Professional developer on Twitter.

I have complied down all the resources into on Notion Page. I'm happy to share that Notion Page with you.
Hope Any Beginner, Intermediator, or Even Expert Developer If find my Article then still I'm sure that MY Notion Will Help them.

I'M SURE YOU'LL FIND SOMETHING FOR YOURSELF:🚀

Don't miss to checkout:

Hey everyone, I'm excited to share my Master Notion Link with all of you! 🚀
I hope you find these resources helpful!

Here's what You'll get👇

1) A Complete Web Development CheatSheet 2) A complete Web Development Resources 3) Clear Cut Full Stack Developer Roadmap 2021 (300+ Resources) 4) Complete Web Developer Roadmap with free resources 5) Frontend Developer Roadmap 2021 6) Web Developer Knowledge 7) Become a Web Developer without spending a penny. 8) Road-map for desktop GUI development in Python 9) 2 Free Sections of the Web Developer Knowledge 10) Framework for Constructing Engaging Tweets 11) The Ultimate list of Product Management Frameworks 12) Pro Tips to Search on Google 13) NICHE MASTER LIST 14) A web designer's toolkit 15) Here To Help 16) Block chain Resources 17) Gaby's Web3 Reading List 18) No code tools 19) Curated list of Nocode tools 20) Basic to advance in stock 21) Engineering Wiki (Guides & Processes, Codebase, Testing, Infrastructure) 22) Oliver's Threads 23) 50 Days of Content 24) Aadit's Swipe File 25) Vlad's Twitter Swipe File 26) Daily Twitter Stats

27) Master Swipe File

*Here's The Master Link To Notion: *

If You Like My Blog and Information I shared then Make sure to Like and Comment on my Blog post.
Also You can connect with me on LinkedIn & can follow me on Twitter

Also I Help Beginner Developer to Getting Started with Web Development in Effective way & Help Fresher Developer to Get their first Remote JOB as well On-Site JOB on My YOUTUBE Channel (Make Sure to Subscribe My Channel If You're Hunting Remote JOB)

Be Socialize More with People, Network with People by doing In Person Meeting.
Keep Coding, Keep Growing !!

Classic DEV Post from 2020:

🚀⚙️ JavaScript Visualized: the JavaScript Engine

As JavaScript devs, we usually don't have to deal with compilers ourselves. However, it's definitely good to know the basics of the JavaScript engine and see how it handles our human-friendly JS code, and turns it into something machines understand! 🥳

Happy coding!

Once suspended, avinashvagh will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, avinashvagh will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by avinashvagh will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If avinashvagh is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag avinashvagh:

avinashvagh consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging avinashvagh will restore default visibility to their posts.
